---
title: "Rachunek prawdopodobieństwa 2R"
description: "semestr zimowy 2023/2024"
semester: "2025/2026"
image: "RR2R.png"
---

Progi punktowe z egzaminu:

  - ndst [0, 49]
  - dst [50, 60]
  - dst+ [61, 75]
  - db [76, 85]
  - db+ [86, 95]
  - bdb [96, 120]

## Aktualności

  - 29.01 odbędą się ćwiczenia

  - Egzamin: 9.02 o godzinie 10:15 w sali 601

  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1XKxRQXDCpqQo86qanq8_1zroUBV5oEPk/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Przykładowe kolokwium</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style=""> </span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1F1UPyr4FEaNtS20V-XWDSzTDQ0IaFC9Q/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Przykładowe kolokwium 2</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style=""> </span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/11pWOTuNQM8ZIquzEVJYWy7IsPCa9fw47/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Przykładowy egzamin</span></a>
  
  - Zajęcia z 16.10 i 20.10 odrabiamy 18.11 w godzinach 10-14 w sali 601

  - wykład 16.10 i ćwiczenia 20.10 są odwołane

  - Kolokwia 24.11.2023 i 12.01.2024

  - 6.10 odbędzie się wykład
  
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/14xJUvMxHJcHPs0IiyWo4sHihXoGyOoYc/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Sylabus</span></a>
  
  - Konsultacje: poniedziałki 14-16
  
  
## Notatki do wykładu

  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1-CWmQRTl8WtfsjgkjI27NHBMbxwbZrYO/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Warunkowa wartość oczekiwana (6.10)</span></a>
  
 - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1b0bWxmkMaxj6xBMsHW1wJPL9FExOmGwE/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Własności wwo (9.10)</span></a>
  
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/14QKEohn-S0_bqlO9iiZafRyJy_zNdfwK/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Interpretacje wwo (23.10)</span></a>
  
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1pBDMw1OZBZEb07qW-P3PMWu6tORAcEGi/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Martyngały i czasy zatrzymania (30.10)</span></a>
  
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1xqy5HQbXQU60TNxBjj7tVQ5iCwnYETFc/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Twierdzenie o zatrzymaniu (6.11)</span></a>
  
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Y3Zku3PpL9Ff1plUknWlYSWKyiQuGIfN/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Twierdzenie o zbieżności (13.11)</span></a>
  
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1DGehxLLGtK3wUDRTXl6RWyp4a2gSR-aM/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Zbieśność martyngałow w L^p (18.11)</span></a>
  
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/19NbYP0FxVGLGFAPBFXOfsGBS0ubxauOD/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Łańcuchy Markowa (20.11)</span></a>
  
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1yc3D-aATQJTaHBNvNLR_xdEoATtn0Y67/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Funkcja przejścia (27.11)</span></a>
  
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/16oXPxxzMOHsKZPvOGBkGFuHEiSJ-O0g9/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Miary niezmiennicze (4.12)</span></a>
  
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1EbJohnYCABD4pa4jkq4rBAKb2_ryVmMQ/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Twierdzenie o zbieżności (11.12)</span></a>
  
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1DGeq1YHnGWFDRXCXYXQRpCR5qKTUlmcx/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Definicja ruchu Browna (18.12)</span></a>
  
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Qu1mQwcbED758k3t4oLyD2rZo664wgsU/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">RM jako ciągły martyngał (8.01)</span></a>
  
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1_pV72pkV-KAfzfp1eTYE1nYKOAhc0qsE/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">trajektorie ruchu Browna (15.01)</span></a>
  
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/14-pdrlnsdTKU5HhmVb2sshmZTjjsnbGY/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Proces Poissona (22.01)</span></a>
  
  
## Listy zadań
 
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/19ErdkRd0PirHXwT3FQiubBHo-BlJnluO/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Definicja warunkowej wartości oczekiwanej</span></a>
  
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1tUwIMisTTJHFiDUDah8wDZfZNChGDQHN/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Własności wwo</span></a>
  
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1tBaiRm5BUKRle-tb2QdIwxmZHkrHrRc2/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Wwo i wyższe momenty</span></a>
  
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1x1a1j3b0ccC68b50dzu3ZrwL_lFbMpyA/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Martyngały po raz pierwszy</span></a>
  
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/129oneNVwHrxBAmOAgnF7dUrxmZGRDCHN/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Twierdzenie o zatrzymaniu</span></a>
  
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1ZzG4BjL-mOvrs4T6s7GNTstqJRj3mBA2/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Martyngały całkowalne z kwadratem</span></a>
  
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1rmhoT3KpYgPOYuPstLyrzm_9ury-FZh7/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Powtórka przed kolokwium</span></a>
  
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1a_LQxuAVew0xjSj-ffDy2weA2OSDCfyn/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Łańcuchy Markowa</span></a>
  
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1luZUuTUQLFSXxkaGFk_DUNlqctKFiEfs/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Rekurencyjne łańcuchy Markowa</span></a>
  
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1An_kDbbNxpN-9mQRERJ_0sUAgnDQSILx/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Rozkłady stacjonarne i spacery na grafach</span></a>
  
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1IZyVtQI0nZtCNI96ijp4dkU2KBFNqkiJ/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Definicja ruchu Browna</span></a>
  
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1LDtSXF2QdkBIT-C8Rv-XYMp3M5hRuTTt/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Własności probabilistyczne RB</span></a>
  
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1RFeaT_xyIY9URznuWgMgll5RNdsQF2AI/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Powtórka przed kolokwium</span></a>
  
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1sFtjE-bYSPSOB6o-G_duEofSwDQp9KeR/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">trajektorie ruchu Browna</span></a>
  
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1IU4v63bKfWJcuMEKizAyZhgs0eY07DTy/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Proces Poissona</span></a>
  
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1jcL82C8rs_HRlQzwpzuLZmB_pzVNSPO4/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">Powtórka przed egzaminem</span></a>
  
## Zadania dodatkowe  
   
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/10L1mxWK7V1PfgYXhkX5JTEJjWAUUny5S/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">zadanie 1 termin 30.10.2023</span></a>
  
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1ryFCuAokv9j3Gw8e3heFTXmTVJfhyeha/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">zadanie 2 termin 15.12.2023</span></a>
  
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1gVORdTdffYaqTRaywwgJRN0-K5TMTPgK/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">zadanie 3 termin 12.01.2024</span></a>
  
  - <a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1yiyOsVkbstSbn9gXnoylLgrn6Z1gj1W7/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">zadanie 4 termin 25.01.2024</span></a>
  
## Symulacje 
  
<iframe jsname="L5Fo6c" class="YMEQtf" sandbox="allow-scripts allow-popups allow-forms allow-same-origin allow-popups-to-escape-sandbox allow-downloads allow-modals allow-storage-access-by-user-activation" frameborder="0" aria-label="YouTube Video, Simple random walk on a square lattice" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/tRy0U4y5CtY?embed_config=%7B%22enc%22:%22AXH1ezlYHq-KrJ0mt8gZNTWbvLPvYWyAXVa_qyElzz5AdnR_NBvSxxALKd7karM2jji5XHxJrWGxfLn5O8KbIn-Y81N64fzllAZkEbw3OJ8IoucHEGggOANxVAPlne9LgyIipBffaAB7odZbQoKRNeKDc12dzF05myvspe_UF7YxFWD3%22%7D&amp;enablejsapi=1&amp;errorlinks=1&amp;rct=CpgBAXH1ezno7Ild_1I0gXIlRHPGy3ONB4DshsIa210Lajbkj_4sUaPAO_bJ_Eok6rlFLOIpgo8VZWTRbZDm0KuJZiS9Q4PS77rsL-Gox6Y-drzIqi9Fv12P0vBdlfB7nVTAQJ4x3O5ikjxxYvz_0moltV94ZAUeRXTZgeebeYRftMeP9O3aPElcroWQYTPjYWfiXoV20uCE4Zs%3D&amp;vl=1" allowfullscreen></iframe>


<iframe jsname="L5Fo6c" class="YMEQtf" sandbox="allow-scripts allow-popups allow-forms allow-same-origin allow-popups-to-escape-sandbox allow-downloads allow-modals allow-storage-access-by-user-activation" frameborder="0" aria-label="YouTube Video, Simple random walk on a triangular lattice" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/0_GvG1ch8m0?embed_config=%7B%22enc%22:%22AXH1eznDt6u0PUvNcr3FodZsjA33lgpKHwH1PqOqVxc4uPfVPjA6vOY8h_4ybpZ-G9noSf4SqNhZLIIZjhPJHUQvhtr3-ecAfrfobrd1tqRgrzqVhg3Pvk4Q7amvF2iaCo9-UdcLpPBqXI6lgu8Y6kMEL4RnRSfWqarBwh6z8na54xn1%22%7D&amp;enablejsapi=1&amp;errorlinks=1&amp;rct=CpcBAXH1ezkDn88ysPnz0tq4xAA6uCM6vA7sHZuyzmxDjMEI5iB2Gb32v79bu3KvFk_P2UDl-aifb_KisWKVAoIXh9BvdzJ_b2KnK48d5xXr5ugjVw4ONkd7XIYKRvMP5bWTbHfqH_obFIe_vHCsTJf00BUyTc5zt_UmSNs7wBtU4UabaALQEGY_Ci_YlqNoBij9PrIIi4Wbng%3D%3D&amp;vl=1" allowfullscreen></iframe>



<iframe jsname="L5Fo6c" class="YMEQtf" sandbox="allow-scripts allow-popups allow-forms allow-same-origin allow-popups-to-escape-sandbox allow-downloads allow-modals allow-storage-access-by-user-activation" frameborder="0" aria-label="YouTube Video, Simple random walk on a hexagonal lattice" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/Vke8bZiyE_o?embed_config=%7B%22enc%22:%22AXH1ezmxotac6oKdZT8T921hAj37PqNTznhCTeIDR03Ic6Z4KQGJxEiRn5JAGRX9lT_mrQ0o40LLFqDvA0SsBpeITVSA0XU0nfT5YW-3aG2bR0kmlnD5X1D7NbavOJZOT8Tdz3sRWY7-DYvpxEiCwl2-ToMQaI89p_SNanFPiCoZ-qxS%22%7D&amp;enablejsapi=1&amp;errorlinks=1&amp;rct=CpYBAXH1ezmpoi-y3U4IlA5sgsPIKxFlY68auviGhOPuxCwyvxfoBh32AL76vKXt5z0jp2e2mPXm50SBsgZCscl5GTVoDUSLPIouW4_403i4qee-LCNCHTj8YwpZMyqbq4mwyPqnhuUXGc24GA6N-Rf8SnUUoN7x8XcVLgTZ-tOnJxLuWlwuZCP8Zj4BfMKa3x_ebz2BWGHw&amp;vl=1" allowfullscreen></iframe>



<iframe jsname="L5Fo6c" class="YMEQtf" sandbox="allow-scripts allow-popups allow-forms allow-same-origin allow-popups-to-escape-sandbox allow-downloads allow-modals allow-storage-access-by-user-activation" frameborder="0" aria-label="YouTube Video, two-dimensional brownian motion" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/tngsowy_kyc?embed_config=%7B%22enc%22:%22AXH1ezk4kyHFxIH3QX0_NdXJOoYUFnVKMsqrZQND0VQG4lmGUnnZr6ag1hDMwLg6MFA-a7YCiZcl7tEPn3yOGGamxYC27CDlJ26AmM-iRz9MvV6UMBP1o5q64J_YV6Z0it2f2Dd3bfx_VtZNaxTJ4JebdqPABOn7K-HTfLLIGs3QPVWu%22%7D&amp;enablejsapi=1&amp;errorlinks=1&amp;rct=CpgBAXH1ezm2za9RyRkbGXkS6RcezXxl6Z8uY8pk4r9QcFZDAo-QHsq69uCS5B3Y0wdZHxhLUWn3QK4nZQ_CVvjbp0n9JwRAZUedn2UpNsCe8hXoIu7fYAeLTu6QcxxWBb8Y_eC9gba0nS5tMAy5a39Cdn3OKugIrvyRhEZZ9M0u4QJro-MJfcsC72De7cH3iwjNkJnxeqvbbhg%3D&amp;vl=1" allowfullscreen></iframe>



<iframe jsname="L5Fo6c" class="YMEQtf" sandbox="allow-scripts allow-popups allow-forms allow-same-origin allow-popups-to-escape-sandbox allow-downloads allow-modals allow-storage-access-by-user-activation" frameborder="0" aria-label="YouTube Video, one-dimensional Brownian motion" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/WLPkswouiIM?embed_config=%7B%22enc%22:%22AXH1ezm-oyzlEQY-p6mm_0oHizLTN3PjlYpjZGY3-O0RvipJJOgTL6bs5OmA7wVlHVzA-xth47HJEGYKiUDa0d6XGjk07YHersisrxjNpS5WFEEg-1Hfn2cIu6QGkIAicsxAnzXkI5_rGSw_yU8PPdu8_ycMH5M2SHtKHn-jTb4qlMvV%22%7D&amp;enablejsapi=1&amp;errorlinks=1&amp;rct=CpcBAXH1ezmMvmakMOcVfddyVjM3GqlgEAHgVLKCaxkwoFjTFtPJVN6rG4OLDf02sVe1aiv8dQa-Ic2_Hpd9KrYM-i0QDwBJb6NprSqUpJoAVF2a9SksCQteKbXaqPUu69b3ShzxYrB8rTjwWrBDfHbFFgJAC9QaCeKvZpQ2BF0lzT-iVCuBQyqZxoBj2mJfR99_XT6VQK9Aiw%3D%3D&amp;vl=1" allowfullscreen></iframe>



<iframe jsname="L5Fo6c" class="YMEQtf" sandbox="allow-scripts allow-popups allow-forms allow-same-origin allow-popups-to-escape-sandbox allow-downloads allow-modals allow-storage-access-by-user-activation" frameborder="0" aria-label="YouTube Video, Lévy&#39;s Construction of Brownian Motion" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/jSotZM52tNs?embed_config=%7B%22enc%22:%22AXH1eznjvPGjiVrv5JWl2w0saezkehl6f1PPD-guMipRlt8PBw22ndOypM5_8p_yti4854MGyUAnCGoYl1s_xeJn05mPeL5AFYr-Kcy3uG90xdsqVbnTCf96s0Wqf_jOZp4SSwuIS60VCTmvcAOtu2zZ42OZbm19rtppicbEXyc4W5Xr%22%7D&amp;enablejsapi=1&amp;errorlinks=1&amp;rct=CpgBAXH1ezm918AX0XiQCkZ3HU2203GLR5Qu6iECgvvrzRyDsH3ODhMPZxGbi3Cp_0xkUafWj7yjQUGlpOy1ylcnYAgxD1jXWs_RKZFV7LH24NDuLbjS0XJ5MXESfYyuovfxw_pD3sweW8OyyR8CN3gKMGmmyVfK4raIU2ewsNkk5CR56SkzYyMRcXaL01OWNxQhjOt--56XfQw%3D&amp;vl=1" allowfullscreen></iframe>
